description: MBOX-369 — applies a single Gmail row action (archive / delete / mark_read) for the dashboard approval queue. Called by dashboard lib/n8n.ts:triggerMsgActionWebhook. Body: { action, account_id, message_id }. archive => messages.modify removeLabelIds [INBOX]; mark_read => messages.modify removeLabelIds [UNREAD]; delete => messages.trash (recoverable, NOT permanent messages.delete). Uses the Gmail REST API via an HTTP Request node (predefined gmailOAuth2 credential) because the n8n Gmail node's 'delete' operation is a PERMANENT delete. Snooze is NOT here — it is appliance-local (Gmail has no snooze API). Single-account today: the one 'Gmail account' credential serves every account_id; per-account credential resolution is the MBOX-162 multi-account follow-up.
name: MailBOX-MsgAction

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, action: $('Webhook (mailbox-msg-action)').item.json.body.action, message_id: $('Webhook (mailbox-msg-action)').item.json.body.message_id, account_id: $('Webhook (mailbox-msg-action)').item.json.body.account_id, at: $now.toISO() } }}
